title: 3 Reasons to Hold Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Stock in Your Portfolio
text: Zimmer Biomet's (ZBH) focus on emerging markets raises optimism about the stock.

title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings: Visible Growth Drivers And Strong Execution
text: ZBH reported strong 3Q23 performance and has provided a positive business outlook. The company's new innovations and increasing presence in ambulatory surgery centers (ASCs) are driving growth. GLP-1 should be a tailwind for ZBH, extending its long-term growth runway.

title: Zimmer Biomet Announces Quarterly Dividend for Fourth Quarter of 2023
text: WARSAW, Ind. , Dec. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE and SIX: ZBH), a global medical technology leader, today announced that its Board of Directors has approved the payment of a quarterly cash dividend to stockholders for the fourth quarter of 2023.

title: Why Is Zimmer (ZBH) Up 10.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Zimmer (ZBH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
